tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Drop shot is my primary finesse rig day in and day out. Known as clear-water technique but also efficient at triggering non-aggressive bass in stained water once you've located a school. Far more versatile than most give it credit for — can use large Texas-rigged baits in cover for big largemouths. 8-10lb line, tungsten weight just heavy enough to keep tension.'
